concept: Announce / To Make a Point Public
description: The formal act of making information known to a community. It implies a level of importance and a responsibility to share information clearly and for the collective good.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'pho' (a generative offering), 'ka' (to stand with strength), and 'mi' (the inner self). The word's structure suggests 'a generative offering from the self that stands for all to see,' defining an announcement as a formal, public declaration.
